title: Manage price risk through trading strategy
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage price risk through trading strategy demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Conduct market research

pcs.text: Collate and evaluate estimates of supply and demand
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collate and evaluate estimates of supply and demand?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collate and evaluate estimates of supply and demand.

pcs.text: Analyse past trends and assess possible future scenarios
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse past trends and assess possible future scenarios?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse past trends and assess possible future scenarios.

pcs.text: Relate own products to market indicators
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Relate own products to market indicators?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Relate own products to market indicators.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Conduct market research

elements.title: Determine price required

pcs.text: Calculate cost of production and determine break-even price
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate cost of production and determine break-even price?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate cost of production and determine break-even price.

pcs.text: Calculate overhead costs to be allocated against the enterprise
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate overhead costs to be allocated against the enterprise?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate overhead costs to be allocated against the enterprise.

pcs.text: Determine margins for profit and risk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine margins for profit and risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine margins for profit and risk.

pcs.text: Set forward price objectives to meet cost of production, contribution to overheads and profit required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set forward price objectives to meet cost of production, contribution to overheads and profit required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set forward price objectives to meet cost of production, contribution to overheads and profit required.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate personal attitude to risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate personal attitude to risk.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine price required

elements.title: Develop sales plan

pcs.text: Evaluate cash markets and assess projected price trends
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate cash markets and assess projected price trends?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate cash markets and assess projected price trends.

pcs.text: Obtain and assess forward contract information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and assess forward contract information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and assess forward contract information.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and assess futures prices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and assess futures prices.

pcs.text: Evaluate selling options against price objectives and the assessment of price movement risk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate selling options against price objectives and the assessment of price movement risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate selling options against price objectives and the assessment of price movement risk.

pcs.text: Assess taxation and cash flow implications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess taxation and cash flow implications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess taxation and cash flow implications.

pcs.text: Develop appropriate mix of sale options in a trading strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop appropriate mix of sale options in a trading strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop appropriate mix of sale options in a trading strategy.

pcs.text: Develop contingency plans to address possible shifts in price trend
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop contingency plans to address possible shifts in price trend?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop contingency plans to address possible shifts in price trend.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Develop sales plan

elements.title: Implement trading strategy

pcs.text: Seek advice from experts as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek advice from experts as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice from experts as required.

pcs.text: Monitor market information and adjust trading strategy according to contingency plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor market information and adjust trading strategy according to contingency plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor market information and adjust trading strategy according to contingency plans.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Implement trading strategy

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
